subcodes.first_line: In all times the Most Exalted Pen is occupied with the remembrance of the friends, in such wise that the melancholy of the world doth not deter it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان قلم اعلی بذکر دوستان مشغول است بشانیکه افسردگی عالم او را
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
